name: Rum Negroni
title: Negroni Cocktail Recipe | How to make a Negroni Rum Cocktail| BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A rum-based Negroni made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho, MARTINI Riserva Speciale Rubino, and MARTINI Riserva Speciale Bitter.
marketing_description: What do you call a negroni made with BACARDÍ Ocho? A Rum Negroni! Pour one during special occasions. It's like a Negroni, but with the richness of BACARDÍ Ocho. A classic reinvented.

steps: Combine all of the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice.
Strain into a rocks glass filled with a large ice cube.
Garnish with an orange wedge or twist.

raw_text_excerpt: How to make a Rum Negroni 30 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum 30 ml MARTINI Riserva Speciale Rubino 30 ml MARTINI Riserva Speciale Bitter 1 Combine Combine all of the ingredients in a mixing glass with ice. 2 Stir Stir until well chilled. 3 Strain Strain into a rocks glass filled with a large ice cube. 4 Garnish Garnish with an orange wedge or twist.

source_metadata.description: Learn how to make the best Negroni Cocktail. Check out our BACARDÍ receipe and ingredient list here and start mixing!
